note: Parallel 1px corner-Wang-16 chart cuts (same bounds as chart_area_tilemaps_and_maps). Interior: totally_land / totally_sea; coast: corner bitmask names.

chart_areas.name: Iberian coast & Ligurian sea
chart_areas.description: Atlantic gateway and the Gallo-Iberian rim — Gades, Massalia, the Catalan strand.

chart_areas.name: Tyrrhenian sea & approaches
chart_areas.description: Italian west coast, Sardinia, Corsica, Latium and Campania.

chart_areas.name: Sicily & Ionian basin
chart_areas.description: Sicilian roadsteads and the heel-and-toe of Italy.

chart_areas.name: North African coast
chart_areas.description: Carthaginian capital and the Tripolitanian and Mauretanian shores.

chart_areas.name: Egypt & Cyrenaica
chart_areas.description: Cyrenaican headlands and the Nile-mouth grain hubs.

chart_areas.name: Aegean & Cretan sea
chart_areas.description: Mainland Greece, the Aegean islands, western Anatolia and Crete.

chart_areas.name: Levant & Cyprus
chart_areas.description: Phoenician home ports and the Cypriot ring.

chart_areas.name: Propontis & Pontus Euxinus
chart_areas.description: Marmara mouth and the Black Sea grain horizon.
